arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are willing to sanction the departure of Yves Bissouma. While the North London club will focus on reinforcing their squad ahead of next season, they will also look to move on a few players who are no longer an important part of their plans. arts.ttl: Club can be ruled out of developing race for Fulham man – Asked twice, now looking elsewhere
arts.sum: São Paulo are unlikely to follow up interest in Fulham striker Carlos Vinicius, preferring move for a more versatile forward addition in the summer. arts.ttl: Chelsea told how much they need to pay for “powerful” Tottenham target
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham will have to fork out in excess of £20 million to sign Sunderland star Jobe Bellingham. arts.ttl: Tottenham plot summer move for forward who missed 48 games last season
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur want to sign the Swedish youth international Roony Bardghji at the end of the season. Tottenham have made significant changes to their transfer policy in recent years. arts.ttl: Tottenham face Premier League fixture change after Europa League win - but only for one match - football.london
arts.sum: Spurs will face Eintracht Frankfurt - winners of the competition in 2021/22 - over two legs in April for a place in the semi-finals. UEFA Europa League games take place on Thursday nights, meaning Premier League matches afterwards cannot be played on Saturdays.

arts.ttl: Team News: Fulham vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Fulham and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Tottenham ‘In Talks’ to Let £30m Star Join Premier League Rivals
arts.sum: Tottenham are holding talks with Brighton over a loan deal for Wilson Odobert.

arts.ttl: Premier League move open for Werner despite Spurs struggles
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will not trigger the €12m option to sign Timo Werner on a permanent deal. Werner joined Spurs on loan in January 2024 before extending the initial six-month arrangement into the current campaign. However, the German has struggled to make an impact and has scored just three goals in 41 appearances across all competitions. arts.ttl: “I remember with pleasure” – Winger has beating Tottenham as one of favourite memories
